2606.14691.title: CORA: Analyzing and bridging thinking-answer gap in Multimodal RLVR via Consistency-Oriented Reasoning Alignment
2606.14691.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has successfully elicited the reasoning capabilities of large language models, motivating its extension to multimodal scenarios. Existing methods primarily focus on improving the visual coverage of reasoning traces and mitigating visual hallucinations, but underestimate the semantic inconsistency between the reasoning process and the final answer. In this paper, we delve into thinking-answer inconsistency in RLVR for large vision-language models (LVLMs), showing thorough analyses of rollouts collected throughout Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) training process and post-RLVR evaluation outputs that this issue persists during training and remains present during inference. Motivated by the analysis, we propose Consistency-Oriented Reasoning Alignment (CORA), which introduces thinking-answer semantic consistency into RLVR through a lightweight plug-and-play consistency reward model, and further incorporates Hybrid Reward Advantage Splitting (HRAS) to stably coordinate task and consistency optimization. Extensive experiments across representative multimodal reasoning benchmarks and mainstream LVLMs show that CORA improves task performance while effectively mitigating thinking-answer inconsistency, leading to more faithful reasoning traces.
2606.14691.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習與可驗證獎勵（RLVR）已成功引發大型語言模型的推理能力，並促使其擴展至多模態場景。現有方法主要集中在改善推理痕跡的視覺覆蓋率和減輕視覺幻覺，但低估了推理過程與最終答案之間的語義不一致性。在本文中，我們深入探討了大型視覺-語言模型（LVLMs）中的思考-答案不一致性，顯示出在整個群體相對策略優化（GRPO）訓練過程中收集的回合和後RLVR評估輸出的徹底分析，這個問題在訓練期間持續存在，並在推理過程中仍然存在。受到分析的啟發，我們提出了一種一致性導向推理對齊（CORA），它通過一種輕量級的即插即用一致性獎勵模型將思考-答案語義一致性引入RLVR，並進一步結合混合獎勵優勢分割（HRAS）以穩定協調任務和一致性優化。在代表性多模態推理基準和主流LVLMs上進行的大量實驗顯示，CORA在有效減輕思考-答案不一致性的同時改善了任務性能，從而導致更真實的推理痕跡。
2606.14691.author: Jiayue Cao et.al.
2606.14691.authors: Jiayue Cao, Zhicong Lu, Xuehan Sun, Wei Jia, Hongling Zheng, Changyuan Tian, Zichuan Lin, Wenqian Lv, Nayu Liu
